content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Word Break (print all ways)". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: 1 <= len(word) <= 10 for all word in wordDict
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a string s and a list of strings wordDict. The string s will be on the first line, and the list of strings wordDict will be on the second line, separated by spaces.
content.outputFormat: The output will be all possible ways to break the string s into words from the wordDict, one way per line.

hidden.label: max boundary
hidden.input:
abcdefghij
[a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j]

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
